_description: Tannuk, Memorial Ensign landfall test. Sequence: (1) Activate Lander token ({2},{T}, sacrifice it) to fetch a Forest from library — first landfall trigger: 1 damage to Bob. (2) Play Forest from hand as normal land play — second landfall trigger: 1 damage to Bob again + Alice draws a card. Demonstrates both the ping and the 'second time this ability has resolved this turn' draw.
